name: socratic-codex
description: Evidence discipline for consequential coding work: gate material user-owned decisions, pivot when investigation stops learning, and close claims with proportionate proof.

interface.shortDescription: Gate drift, stalled diagnosis, and proof.
interface.longDescription: Socratic Codex adds three evidence gates for consequential coding work: ask only at material user-owned boundaries, pivot from repeated fixes when evidence stops changing the next action, and close requested outcomes with claim-matched proof at a depth proportionate to risk. It stays quiet during routine execution, prevents both premature closure and unbounded verification, and delegates planning, permissions, state, and handoff to the host.
defaultPrompt: Use $socratic-codex to protect material boundaries and close this task with proportionate proof.
Use $socratic-codex to recover this investigation from an evidence plateau.
Use $socratic-codex to test this completion claim against claim-matched evidence.
